pageDescription: Monthly revenue, labor, and cost summary for accountant handoff
noData: No data available for this period.
orderCount: {count, plural, =0 {0 orders} one {1 order} other {# orders}}
laborEntries: {count, plural, =0 {0 entries} one {1 entry} other {# entries}}
liveNotice: Totals are computed live and may change until the month is closed.
notesPlaceholder: Optional notes for the accountant or tax preparer…
closeConfirmBody: Closing {period} will freeze all totals. This action cannot be undone.
closeError: Failed to close month. Please try again.

summary.noExpenseCategories: No quick expenses recorded for this month.
summary.noPurchaseCategories: No purchase orders recorded for this month.

income.title: Income snapshot
income.empty: No completed sales in this month.

spending.title: Spending snapshot
spending.noSpendCategories: No quick expense categories recorded for this month.

spending.addExpenseHint: Record a quick paid cost for the branch.
spending.dialogHint: Record a quick paid cost for {branch}.
spending.purchaseOrderDialogHint: Record supplier goods for {branch}. Leave already paid unchecked when payment is due later.
spending.quickExpenseBody: Use this for simple branch costs such as utilities, rent, tax, repairs, or a receipt already paid by the branch.
spending.manageLocked: You can review branch spending here, but your role cannot add or remove expenses.
spending.emptyExpenses: No quick expenses recorded for this month.
spending.emptyPurchases: No purchase orders recorded for this month.

branchLedger.title: Branch finance ledger
branchLedger.subtitle: Filter {period} by type, category, date, or text. The summary changes with the selected rows.
branchLedger.filteredRows: {count, plural, =0 {0 rows selected} one {# row selected} other {# rows selected}}
branchLedger.reportBody: Filtered rows export as a spreadsheet-compatible sheet now. Standard balance-sheet PDF is reserved for the reporting step so the accountant format stays consistent.
branchLedger.empty: No ledger rows match this filter.
branchLedger.deleteBody: This will remove "{description}" from the branch expense ledger.

company.pageDescription: Review the business at company level first, then filter to one branch when you need a tighter financial read.

stats.totalSpendHint: Purchasing, branch expenses, and shared company expenses
stats.grossProfitHint: Net sales ex tax less spend in scope
stats.branchProfitHint: Shared company expenses are not allocated here

company.selectedBranchCompanyExpenseNotice: {amount} of shared company expenses were recorded in this period. They are shown for context and are not deducted from this branch operating profit.

summary.trendDescription: Net sales, spend, and operating profit across the selected quarter.
summary.branchCompareDescription: Compare the branches in this scope without leaving the company finance view.
summary.chartEmpty: No finance data available for this scope yet.
summary.snapshotDescription: Use this as the owner-facing read before drilling into a branch.
summary.periodTableDescription: Use month and quarter views to track movement instead of reading one crowded summary.

branches.title: Branch finance table
branches.description: Filter here or open the owner branch detail when a single location needs action.

tax.title: Sales tax view
tax.description: Estimated from each branch tax setting and the order totals collected from customers.
tax.empty: No tax data available for this scope.
tax.tableDescription: This helps owners and accountants review taxable sales without leaving the company workspace.

sharedExpenses.title: Shared company expenses
sharedExpenses.description: Use this for head-office, shared tools, accounting, rent, or any cost that should stay at company level.
sharedExpenses.descriptionPlaceholder: What was this company expense for?
sharedExpenses.empty: No shared company expenses recorded for this period.
sharedExpenses.ledgerDescription: Review company-level overhead without mixing it into branch operations.
